narration: A rope bridge sways over an abyss. The ropes are old. Your options… are older.

options.label: Grip tight and move fast — Roll 4+
Sprint and leap the gap — Roll 7+

narration: A cloaked merchant eyes you. He holds the key you need. He holds all the leverage too.

options.label: Lift it from his pocket — Roll 7+

narration: A stone guardian wakes. It has stood watch for centuries. You have interrupted that.
Pressure plates line the corridor. Every step is a wager. Welcome to my domain.

options.label: Roll across in one move — Roll 6+

narration: The dungeon warden rises. Half dead. Twice as dangerous. It has been waiting for you specifically.
A cursed relic pulses with dark energy. It wants to be taken. Nothing that powerful wants something good.
